creator: jhs@berklix.com
text:
www/w3mfiles/patch-main.c breaks the build on 10.1 & current with

main.o: In function `main':
main.c:(.text+0x10eb): undefined reference to `GC_get_warn_proc'

removing patch-main.c allows make install to run
(& as its one of Many dependencies firefox its more urgent to get to install
than check what it does!
